$comment: Facet PWA manifest template. Copy into your project root as manifest.json, fill the placeholders, link it with <link rel="manifest" href="/manifest.json">, and ship the three icons: icon-192.png (192x192), icon-512.png (512x512), and icon-512-maskable.png (512x512 with the artwork inside the inner 80% safe zone). Set theme_color and background_color to your theme's --background value so the installed app's chrome matches.
name: Your app's full name
description: One line on what this app does.
